title: spiesia stracheyana
intro: Spiesia stracheyana, also known as Pongamia pinnata, is a tropical tree native to the Indian subcontinent, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Spiesia stracheyana include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce cholesterol levels, lower blood pressure, and provide relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Spiesia stracheyana include oil extracted from its seeds, which is used in traditional medicine for various purposes, including skin and hair care.
